request.complaint: I sent 5000 taka to a wrong number around 2pm today. The number was supposed to be 01712345678 but I think I typed it wrong. The person isn't responding to my call. Please help me get my money back.

expected_output.agent_summary: Customer reports sending 5000 BDT via TXN-9101 to +8801719876543, which they now believe was the wrong recipient. Recipient is unresponsive.
expected_output.recommended_next_action: Verify TXN-9101 details with the customer and initiate the wrong-transfer dispute workflow per policy.
expected_output.customer_reply: We have noted your concern about transaction TXN-9101. Please do not share your PIN or OTP with anyone. Our dispute team will review the case and contact you through official support channels.

actual_response.agent_summary: Customer reports sending 5000 BDT to a wrong number (+8801719876543) around 2 PM today, instead of the intended 01712345678. Transaction TXN-9101 for 5000 BDT to +8801719876543 at 14:08:22 is completed and matches the complaint details.
actual_response.recommended_next_action: Initiate a wrong transfer investigation for TXN-9101. Attempt to contact the recipient (+8801719876543) to request a voluntary return of funds. Inform the customer about the investigation process and expected timelines.
actual_response.customer_reply: Dear Customer, we understand your concern regarding the 5000 BDT transfer made to a wrong number today. We have noted the details of your complaint and the transaction (TXN-9101). We are initiating an investigation into this matter. Please note that recovering funds in a wrong transfer case depends on various factors, including the cooperation of the recipient. We will do our best to assist you. Any eligible amount will be returned through official channels, subject to verification and our standard dispute resolution process. We will keep you updated on the progress of our investigation.

responses.label: Wrong transfer claim with inconsistent evidence

request.complaint: I sent 2000 to the wrong person by mistake. Please reverse it.

expected_output.agent_summary: Customer claims TXN-9202 (2000 BDT to +8801812345678) was a wrong transfer, but transaction history shows three prior transfers to the same counterparty in the past nine days, suggesting an established recipient.
expected_output.recommended_next_action: Flag for human review. Verify with the customer whether this was genuinely a wrong transfer given the established transaction pattern with this recipient.
expected_output.customer_reply: We have received your request regarding transaction TXN-9202. Please do not share your PIN or OTP with anyone. Our dispute team will review the case carefully and contact you through official support channels.

actual_response.agent_summary: Customer mistakenly sent 2000 BDT to an incorrect recipient (+8801812345678) via transaction TXN-9202 and requests a reversal.
actual_response.recommended_next_action: Initiate the wrong transfer recovery process for TXN-9202. Attempt to contact the recipient for fund recovery as per policy.
actual_response.customer_reply: We understand you mistakenly sent 2000 BDT to the wrong person and wish to reverse it. We have noted your request and initiated a review of transaction TXN-9202. Please be aware that recovering funds from a completed transfer to an incorrect recipient depends on various factors, including the cooperation of the recipient. We will investigate this matter according to our dispute resolution policy. Any eligible amount will be returned through official channels, subject to verification and our standard dispute resolution process. We will keep you updated on the progress.

request.complaint: I tried to pay 1200 taka for my mobile recharge but the app showed failed. But my balance was deducted! Please refund my money.

expected_output.agent_summary: Customer attempted a 1200 BDT mobile recharge (TXN-9301) which failed, but reports balance was deducted. Requires payments operations investigation.
expected_output.recommended_next_action: Investigate TXN-9301 ledger status. If balance was deducted on a failed payment, initiate the automatic reversal flow within standard SLA.
expected_output.customer_reply: We have noted that transaction TXN-9301 may have caused an unexpected balance deduction. Our payments team will review the case and any eligible amount will be returned through official channels. Please do not share your PIN or OTP with anyone.

actual_response.agent_summary: Customer reported a 1200 BDT mobile recharge payment failed, but their balance was deducted. Transaction history confirms a failed payment of 1200 BDT.
actual_response.recommended_next_action: Investigate TXN-9301 to confirm balance deduction and initiate reversal if applicable. Verify if the recharge was eventually applied.
actual_response.customer_reply: Dear customer, we understand you experienced an issue with a 1200 BDT mobile recharge payment that failed but deducted your balance. We have noted your complaint and are investigating the transaction (TXN-9301). Any eligible amount will be returned through official channels, subject to verification and our standard dispute resolution process. We will update you as soon as possible.

request.complaint: I paid 500 to a merchant for a product but I changed my mind and don't want it anymore. Please refund my 500 taka.

expected_output.agent_summary: Customer requests refund of 500 BDT for TXN-9401 (merchant payment) due to change of mind. Not a service failure.
expected_output.recommended_next_action: Inform the customer that refund eligibility depends on the merchant's own policy. Provide guidance on contacting the merchant directly for a refund.
expected_output.customer_reply: Thank you for reaching out. Refunds for completed merchant payments depend on the merchant's own policy. We recommend contacting the merchant directly. If you need help reaching them, please reply and we will guide you. Please do not share your PIN or OTP with anyone.

actual_response.agent_summary: Customer requests a refund of 500 BDT for a payment made to merchant MERCHANT-7821 (TXN-9401) as they changed their mind about the product.
actual_response.recommended_next_action: Advise the customer to contact the merchant (MERCHANT-7821) directly to request a refund for the product. Explain that our platform facilitates the payment but the refund decision rests with the merchant based on their return policy.
actual_response.customer_reply: Dear Customer, we understand you wish to refund your 500 BDT payment made to MERCHANT-7821. For refunds related to products or services purchased from a merchant, the first step is to directly contact the merchant. They will be able to assist you with their return and refund policy. Please reach out to MERCHANT-7821 regarding your request. If you face any issues after contacting the merchant, please let us know.

request.complaint: Someone called me saying they are from bKash and asked for my OTP. They said my account will be blocked if I don't share it. Is this real? I haven't shared anything yet.

expected_output.agent_summary: Customer reports an unsolicited call claiming to be from the company and asking for OTP. Customer has not yet shared credentials. Likely social engineering attempt.
expected_output.recommended_next_action: Escalate to fraud_risk team immediately. Confirm to customer that the company never asks for OTP. Log the reported number for fraud pattern analysis.
expected_output.customer_reply: Thank you for reaching out before sharing any information. We never ask for your PIN, OTP, or password under any circumstances. Please do not share these with anyone, even if they claim to be from us. Our fraud team has been notified of this incident.

actual_response.agent_summary: Customer reported receiving a suspicious call from someone impersonating bKash, asking for their OTP and threatening account blockage. The customer did not share any information.
actual_response.recommended_next_action: Advise the customer to block the suspicious number and never share sensitive information. Escalate to the fraud risk team for potential investigation of the reported number and pattern analysis.
actual_response.customer_reply: For security, please never share your PIN, OTP, or password with anyone, including our support team.

request.complaint: Something is wrong with my money. Please check.

expected_output.agent_summary: Customer reports a vague concern about their money without specifying transaction, amount, or issue. Insufficient detail to identify any relevant transaction.
expected_output.recommended_next_action: Reply to customer asking for specific details: which transaction, what amount, what went wrong, and approximate time.
expected_output.customer_reply: Thank you for reaching out. To help you faster, please share the transaction ID, the amount involved, and a short description of what went wrong. Please do not share your PIN or OTP with anyone.

actual_response.agent_summary: Customer reports 'something is wrong with my money' but provides no specific details, amount, or transaction to investigate. Transaction history shows two completed transactions.
actual_response.recommended_next_action: Contact customer to gather more specific details about their concern, including the exact amount, date, and type of transaction they are referring to.
actual_response.customer_reply: Thank you for reaching out. To help us understand and resolve your concern about your money, please provide more specific details. Could you tell us which transaction you are referring to, including the amount, date, and what you believe went wrong? This will help us investigate thoroughly.

request.complaint: আমি আজ সকালে এজেন্টের কাছে ২০০০ টাকা ক্যাশ ইন করেছি কিন্তু আমার ব্যালেন্সে টাকা আসেনি। এজেন্ট বলছে টাকা পাঠিয়েছে কিন্তু আমি দেখছি না।

expected_output.agent_summary: Customer reports 2000 BDT cash-in via AGENT-318 (TXN-9701) not reflected in balance. Transaction status is pending. Agent claims funds were sent.
expected_output.recommended_next_action: Investigate TXN-9701 pending status with agent operations. Confirm settlement state and resolve within the standard cash-in SLA.
expected_output.customer_reply: আপনার লেনদেন TXN-9701 এর বিষয়ে আমরা অবগত হয়েছি। আমাদের এজেন্ট অপারেশন্স দল এটি দ্রুত যাচাই করবে এবং অফিসিয়াল চ্যানেলে আপনাকে জানাবে। অনুগ্রহ করে কারো সাথে আপনার পিন বা ওটিপি শেয়ার করবেন না।

actual_response.agent_summary: System error during analysis. Manual review required.
actual_response.recommended_next_action: Escalate to supervisor for manual review.
actual_response.customer_reply: Thank you for contacting us. Your complaint has been received and is being reviewed by our team. We will update you through official channels shortly.

request.complaint: I sent 1000 to my brother yesterday but he says he didn't get it. Please check.

expected_output.agent_summary: Customer reports a 1000 BDT transfer to their brother was not received. Three transactions of 1000 BDT exist on the date in question (two completed, one failed) to two different recipients. Cannot determine which is the brother's number without further input.
expected_output.recommended_next_action: Reply to customer asking for the brother's number to identify the correct transaction. Do not initiate dispute until the transaction is confirmed.
expected_output.customer_reply: Thank you for reaching out. We see multiple transactions of 1000 BDT on that date. Could you share your brother's number so we can identify the right transaction? Please do not share your PIN or OTP with anyone.

actual_response.agent_summary: System error during analysis. Manual review required.
actual_response.recommended_next_action: Escalate to supervisor for manual review.
actual_response.customer_reply: Thank you for contacting us. Your complaint has been received and is being reviewed by our team. We will update you through official channels shortly.

request.complaint: I am a merchant. My yesterday's sales of 15000 taka have not been settled to my account. Settlement usually happens by 11am next day. Please check.

expected_output.agent_summary: Merchant reports yesterday's 15000 BDT settlement (TXN-9901) is delayed beyond the standard 11 AM next-day window. Settlement status is pending.
expected_output.recommended_next_action: Route to merchant_operations to verify settlement batch status. If the batch is delayed, communicate a revised ETA to the merchant.
expected_output.customer_reply: We have noted your concern about settlement TXN-9901. Our merchant operations team will check the batch status and update you on the expected settlement time through official channels.

actual_response.agent_summary: System error during analysis. Manual review required.
actual_response.recommended_next_action: Escalate to supervisor for manual review.
actual_response.customer_reply: Thank you for contacting us. Your complaint has been received and is being reviewed by our team. We will update you through official channels shortly.

request.complaint: I paid my electricity bill 850 taka but it deducted twice from my account. Please check, I only paid once.

expected_output.agent_summary: Customer reports duplicate electricity bill payment. Two identical 850 BDT payments to BILLER-DESCO were completed 12 seconds apart (TXN-10001 and TXN-10002). The second is likely the duplicate.
expected_output.recommended_next_action: Verify the duplicate with payments_ops. If the biller confirms only one payment was received, initiate reversal of TXN-10002.
expected_output.customer_reply: We have noted the possible duplicate payment for transaction TXN-10002. Our payments team will verify with the biller and any eligible amount will be returned through official channels. Please do not share your PIN or OTP with anyone.

actual_response.agent_summary: System error during analysis. Manual review required.
actual_response.recommended_next_action: Escalate to supervisor for manual review.
actual_response.customer_reply: Thank you for contacting us. Your complaint has been received and is being reviewed by our team. We will update you through official channels shortly.
